title: CENTCOM shoots down 4 IRGC drones near Hormuz, strikes Goruk and Qeshm Island radar sites
snippet: The U.S. military shot down four Iranian drones launched toward the Strait of Hormuz on June 5, with CENTCOM stating the attack drones 'posed an immediate threat to regional maritime traffic.' In response, CENTCOM struck Iranian coastal surveillance radar sites in the city of Goruk and on Qeshm Island 'to defend against further attacks.' Iran condemned the incidents as ceasefire violations.
tag_reason: No similar CENTCOM drone shootdown/radar strike event in previous 7 days' sources. New military escalation on June 5.
